LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SCOTT CO. OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF BY RELYING UPON PLAINTIFF'S FACTUALLY DEVOID DISCOVERY. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. HAVING EXAMINED PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION TESTIMONY AND DEFENDANT'S SUBSEQUENT SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES. - IN PARTICULAR #'S 2, 3, 5, 6, 21, 30, 31, 49, 58, 59, 77, 86, 87 - PLAINTIFF HAS ASKED REPEATEDLY FOR FACTS SUPPORTING HIS CLAIM AGAINST DEEFNDANT. FOR THAT REASON, PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION IS NOT ADMISSABLE UNDER D'AMICO V BOARD OF MEDICAL EXAMINERS (1974) 11 CAL; 3RD. 1,15. THE AY DECLARATION IS NOT ADMISSABLE AS WELL. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
